docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-10-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-10-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF LOUISA MENDOZA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TYRICE IVY IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY MENDOZA, LOUISA AS TO DEFENDANT IVY, TYRICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-09-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT IVY, TYRICE HEARING SET FOR OCT-16-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT - OFF CALENDAR. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT.

THE MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF OCT-16-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF/JUDGMENT CREDITOR LOUISA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT/JUDGMENT DEBTOR TYRICE IVY IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT (NOTES) FILED BY DEFENDANT IVY, TYRICE HEARING SET FOR DEC-10-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY TYRICE IVY IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO DEC-10-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN 506 FOR TRIAL.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MENDOZA, LOUISA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IVY, TYRICE $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,070.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-09-2019 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-02-2020 ORDERED DESTROYED
